zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：高位震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
趋势判断：SOL/USD短线维持震荡上行结构，价格稳居69上方运行，接近前高69.5区域，整体仍偏多头，但进入高位整理阶段。

技术指标方面，MACD柱值为正并走扩，显示多头动能仍在延续；价格站稳20日均线67.02上方，均线结构转强，但RSI缺失需谨慎判断超买。

支撑阻力：上方关键阻力位于69.5与70整数关口，下方短期支撑68.0及67.9，20日均线67.0构成强支撑带，若跌破则趋势转弱。

交易建议：短线回踩68附近可分批布局多单，止损设67.5下方；若放量突破69.5则顺势追多，目标看向70-71区间，注意控制仓位，谨防假突破

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana against the US Dollar is maintaining a short-term bullish structure after recovering from the 67.91 intraday low and pushing toward 69.33. Price action shows steady higher lows over the session, supported by a 1.55% daily gain. The market is consolidating near the upper range of the day, suggesting accumulation rather than distribution. Momentum remains constructive as buyers continue to defend dips above key short-term moving averages, keeping the near-term bias tilted upward.

Momentum indicators reinforce a cautiously bullish bias. The MACD reading at 0.133 suggests improving upside momentum, though confirmation from a signal line is unavailable. Price trading above the SMA(20) at 67.02 indicates a recovering trend and short-term buyer control. While RSI is not provided, price behavior near recent highs implies mildly stretched conditions, signaling the possibility of short consolidation before another directional push develops.

Immediate support is established at 67.90, aligning with the session low, followed by stronger structural support near the SMA(20) at 67.02. A breakdown below this zone would weaken bullish momentum and expose 66.20 as the next downside area. On the upside, resistance is located at 69.49, the recent high. A decisive break above this level could open room toward psychological resistance at 70.00 and potentially extend toward 71.50 if momentum accelerates.

Short-term traders may consider buying pullbacks toward 67.50–67.00 with risk management placed below 66.80. Momentum traders can wait for a confirmed breakout above 69.50 before adding long exposure, targeting extensions toward 70.00–71.50. Given proximity to resistance, aggressive chasing is less favorable here. Overall, conditions favor dip-buying within the prevailing uptrend while monitoring volume confirmation to validate any breakout continuation.
